text.title: Agent Context Engineering Corpus Standard Worked Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the agent-context-engineering-corpus-standard methodology.

example.title: Support-agent corpus for refund automation
example.narrative: Sources: policy docs (90-day freshness), refund tickets (7-day freshness), prior chats (24-hour freshness). Ranking: BM25 + cross-encoder; tie-break newest-first. Citations: ticket ID + URL. PII redaction: card numbers + emails masked before LLM call.
example.artifact: corpus-policy.md with full policy + sample-run trace.
